timeline.title: Research Assistant
timeline.company: School of Automation, Key Laboratory of Intelligent Information Processing and System Integration of IoT, Ministry of Education,GDUT
timeline.summary: Focus: Zero-shot and Mapless Navigation for mobile robots.
highlights: Revealed critical latency and semantic-geometric inconsistency bottlenecks in LLM-based real-time robot navigation.
Developed a dual-rate asynchronous zero-shot mapless navigation framework to decouple reasoning and reactive control.
Equipped semantic memory and visibility-aware constraints for robust target retrieval and continuous observability.
Achieved state-of-the-art navigation success rate and low localization error in both simulation and industrial tests.
